case_title: FCC NATIONAL BANK ASSIGNEE OF THE FIRST NATIONAL vs. FLUALLEN, JOE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FCC NATIONAL BANK ASSIGNEE OF THE FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF CHICAGO ISSUER OF FIRST CARD AS TO DEFENDANT FLUALLEN, JOE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-24-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-04-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1995, CONTINUED TO DEC-15-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND SUBMIT A POS BY PUBLICATION. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK, EXTENSION GRANTED TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT & SUBMIT POS BY PUBLICATION OR TO DISMISS ACTION, STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 15/DEC/95 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FCC NATIONAL BANK ASSIGNEE OF THE FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF CHICAGO ISSUER OF FIRST CARD TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL DEC-01-1995
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
